name: SSR Mining Inc.
description: SSR Mining Inc. is a free cash flow-focused gold producer with operating mines in the USA (Marigold, Nevada), Canada, and Argentina, targeting 450,000–535,000 gold equivalent ounces in 2026. The company's Çöpler mine in Türkiye has been suspended since a February 2024 heap leach pad incident, and SSR announced the sale of its 80% Çöpler stake for US$1.5 billion in March 2026, a transaction expected to close in Q3 2026.
